ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claimant */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who processed the claim */,
  "claimed_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed by the claimant */,
  "allowed_amount" TEXT /* Amount allowed by the legal firm */,
  "percent_recovery" TEXT /* Percentage of the claimed amount that is recoverable */,
  "claim_class" INTEGER /* Class of the claim */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the receiver's claim determination */,
  "decision_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the decision made on the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES case_participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claim_class FOREIGN KEY ("claim_class") REFERENCES claim_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_claimant_id FOREIGN KEY ("claimant_id") REFERENCES claimants ("claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claimants" (
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claimant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the claimant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the claimant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the claimant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the claimant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the claimant */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent) of the claimant */,
  "claimant_type" TEXT /* Type of claimant (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the claim class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the claim class */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the claim class */,
  "legal_basis" TEXT /* Legal basis for the claim class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Reference to the claim for which payment is made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was issued */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_claim_number FOREIGN KEY ("claim_number") REFERENCES claims ("claim_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal case */,
  "court" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case is being heard */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the legal case */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the legal case */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of legal case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "case_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_claimants" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal case */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claimant involved in the case */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the claimant in the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id", "claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal case the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal case the update is for */,
  "update_note" TEXT /* Text of the update or note */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES case_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal case the participant is involved in */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the case */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the participant represents */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_participants_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal case the decision is for */,
  "decision_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_type" TEXT /* Type of decision */,
  "legal_citation" TEXT /* Legal citation for the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_decisions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
